content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears to be on course near the center of the track.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 23, target index = (23+5) % 121 = 28
- Target WP28: x=7.0997, y=1.1461
- Car: x=6.4162, y=0.6890, heading=2.450°
- dy = 1.1461 - 0.6890 = 0.4571, dx = 7.0997 - 6.4162 = 0.6835
- bearing = atan2(0.4571, 0.6835) = 33.79°
- delta = 33.79 - 2.450 = +31.34° → left

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3808m, distance_from_center = 0.0179m
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance (right) = 0.3808 - 0.0179 = 0.363m → well clear

Delta ~+31.3° → |delta| 30-50°, speed=1.0-1.5, steering_angle=15-20. Use steering_angle=15 at speed=1.5 (delta is near the lower bound of this range).

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, WP28 bearing gives delta ~+31.3° (left), continuing left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the waypoint line through the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Big right curve begins around WP22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track loops back along y≈2.77 heading left.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~2.5° (nearly due east), well-centered on track.",
    "Right curve ahead requires progressive left steering (positive delta) to follow waypoints.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.363m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.1188, 6.2187, 6.3170, 6.4162],
    "y": [0.6663, 0.6696, 0.6766, 0.6890],
    "heading": [-0.912, -0.029, 1.007, 2.450]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP28 at (7.100, 1.146): bearing=33.79°, delta=+31.34° → moderate-left steer.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
